---
date: 2026-05-17
updatedAt: "17/05/2026, 17:30"
title: AFOS Daily — May 17, 2026
locale: en
status: published
lede: "**[Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket)** (USD 78,85M accumulated since opening) deepens divergence with published polling: Lula remains stable at 44,50% (USD 5,47M accumulated) while Flávio Bolsonaro declines to 31,30% (USD 5,63M), gap widens to +13,20pp (vs +12,00pp the previous night). **[STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeach** consolidates new cycle low at 6,15% (↓6,60pp in 48h vs peak of 12,75% on May 15). **Lula signals reappointment** of Jorge Messias for [STF](/en/glossary#stf) vacancy and Hugo Motta promises CPI Master with procedural treatment, drawing an Executive–Legislature axis that replaces the [STF](/en/glossary#stf) as investigative theater."
---
## 1. Prediction market

On the [Polymarket presidential](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-presidential-election) — market of USD 78.85M accumulated since opening — Lula remains stable at **44.50% (accumulated volume USD 5.47M)** while Flávio Bolsonaro declines to **31.30% (USD 5.63M)**, a drop of ↓1.20pp in 18 hours vs 32.50% at the close of May 16 evening. The gap **widens to +13.20pp Lula** (vs +12.00pp on May 16 evening, ↑1.20pp in 18h) — an atypical movement on a Sunday of light coverage, in which Lula consolidates without gaining and Flávio loses without the gain clearly migrating to a third candidate.

In the third way, Renan Santos declines slightly to **9.05% (USD 5.10M)** (↓0.70pp in 18h) but maintains the top Polymarket position of the third way above Romeu Zema at **5.35% (USD 2.43M)** (↓0.30pp in 18h). Caiado remains stable at **1.15% (USD 2.66M)**; Michelle Bolsonaro declines to **2.35% (USD 6.08M)** (↓0.45pp in 18h), resuming a downward trajectory after the previous day's stability. Tarcísio de Freitas registers 0.35% (USD 11.18M accumulated) — an anomaly of high volume at low probability that indicates historical concentration of bets for and against since market opening, not a signal of current competitiveness.

In the [second round Polymarket](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-presidential-election-first-round-2nd-place), Flávio maintains leadership at **62.00%** (↑1.50pp in 18h, [PL](/en/glossary#pl) base resists) × Lula 16.00% (↑1.00pp in 18h) × Renan **surges to 7.70%** (USD 996k, ↑1.90pp in 18h vs 5.80% on May 16) — the market prices in the chance of Renan becoming second place as Flávio declines. In the [third place Polymarket](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-presidential-election-first-round-3rd-place), Zema **recovers to 36.50%** (↑4.00pp in 18h, reverting the colossal decline of May 16 and resuming leadership) ahead of Renan at 30.00% (↓1.00pp in 18h) and Caiado at **20.50%** (↑2.00pp in 18h, ↑4.00pp in 48h). Flávio **collapses in third place to 3.25%** (↓2.30pp in 18h vs 5.55% on May 16), with the market removing the senator from the third position scenario.

The pricing of [impeachment STF before 2027](https://polymarket.com/event/any-brazil-stf-justice-removed-by-impeachment-before-2027) reaches **cycle low of 6.15% (USD 71k)** (↓1.10pp in 24h, ↓6.60pp in 48h vs peak of 12.75% on May 15), consolidating 1.85pp below the 8% baseline registered at the close of May 14 evening. The market prices in that the [reinomination of Jorge Messias to STF, advanced by Folha de S.Paulo](https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/poder/2026/05/lula-diz-a-aliados-que-vai-reenviar-ao-senado-indicacao-de-messias-para-vaga-do-stf.shtml), signals Executive–[STF](/en/glossary#stf) coordination that reduces the impeachment scenario via politics.

In the [Senate 2026 most seats](https://polymarket.com/event/next-brazil-senate-election-most-seats-won), [PL](/en/glossary#pl) maintains **78.50% (USD 243k)** (↑0.50pp, stable) and [Republicanos](/en/glossary#republicanos) **recovers to 11.00%** (USD 1k, ↑0.60pp in 18h). [PSD](/en/glossary#psd) reverts decline to **5.65%** (↑2.05pp in 18h vs 3.60% on May 16). The [MDB](/en/glossary#mdb) **collapses the anomalous spike from the previous day to 4.70%** (↓11.85pp in 18h vs 16.55% on May 16) — the accumulated volume USD 1k confirms that the May 16 peak was a low liquidity distortion, not a signal. The Senate sub-markets are characterized by accumulated volumes in the USD 1k–2k range, requiring caution in reading variations beyond [PL](/en/glossary#pl).

In [annual inflation 2026](https://polymarket.com/event/brazil-annual-inflation-2026), the grouping of **high bands (≥6.50%) recovers to 15.85%** (↑2.65pp in 18h vs 13.20% on May 16), reverting the previous day's decline — extreme fiscal narrative returns to being priced in. The central band 5.00–5.49% rises to 27.60% (↑1.55pp).

## 2. What the institutes registered

The current national reference remains the [Datafolha published on May 16 by Folha de S.Paulo](https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/poder/2026/05/datafolha-governo-lula-tem-39-de-avaliacao-negativa-e-30-de-positiva.shtml) (n=2.004, field May 12-14, registration [TSE BR-00290/2026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/)) with Lula 38% × Flávio 35% in the [1º turno](/en/glossary#primeiro-turno) (gap +3pp) and tie 45% × 45% in the [2º turno](/en/glossary#segundo-turno). The [Quaest](/en/glossary#quaest) published on May 13 with Lula 39% × Flávio 33% (gap +6pp) remains as an intermediate reference. No new national poll was released on May 17; [VEJA published a comparative analysis of Datafolha and AtlasIntel in the context following the Flávio–Vorcaro audio](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxPaDJCR3J6OTBvZUF0U0lHbFZVOGd2dmY2NUlCZVU2TE54VWtjcmFsenZwVEFQZ3NVWkhHb2UwdFpuZnBvM3FCSzJVTWlGeXBIa2phRllVd0hkRVF2VXJ3MkxwaFZxWEtjamtxZWZXd2xsTmlKdUx3djdueTNwdWdLTkttSDBrb0c3cHFEVldobFFiSFk4ZGVVckZyTXdQNENzRmJ2M1Rfb1BnNXpwSnlNUjRic09SUXNZX3lNMi1QOW51NkdR?oc=5), framing the window as a pre-scandal portrait in most of the field.

The divergence between market and poll **widens on May 17**: Polymarket prices in a gap of +13.20pp Lula in the [1º turno](/en/glossary#primeiro-turno) while [Datafolha](/en/glossary#datafolha) registers +3pp — a divergence of 10.20pp between the signal of "real money" (USD 11.10M summing volumes Lula + Flávio) and the published poll n=2.004. Carta Capital reported [new poll of voting intention in Minas Gerais amid Pacheco's uncertainty](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxNbGZaVDBpbWlQTmpYYkoxY19WWlVWMnJjRUZyVWJUc3puSVdkY2VPakRyRlJWcTRPNWx0OEdfd2JJaVZCWDViOHlOQ21sQ3JjbHZ3M05wT0E5dG1RRTlPX2hDcVdLcjBXSjZRYTg2MTJvYVZlUmFXdUdZVVJxWUE0eFA2ZGc5bktJeGNYTEhuVVQwd2tLYnFIc2NIdkJhNTNSN3c3VEhpYVNfM19RSmI2UGphUk4tdEhIV25nNU0zSkRYVk5WZEd3Y05YOA?oc=5), opening a relevant state window in the week.

### 📅 Polls calendar — next 7 days

Polls registered at [TSE](/en/glossary#tse) with publication scheduled between **May 18 and May 24**. Inclusion in the table does not mean publication is confirmed — institutes may delay or cancel release. Filter applied: sample ≥ 1.000. Each protocol linked to the [TSE public consultation](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/).

| Date | Institute | Sample | Scope | TSE Protocol | Conf. |
|——|———--|———|——--|—————|——-|
| **May 19** | **[AtlasIntel](/en/glossary#atlasintel) 🔥** | **5.000** | state | [BR069392026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.9 |
| May 19 | [AtlasIntel](/en/glossary#atlasintel) | 1.200 | state | [BR032432026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.8 |
| **May 20** | **VETOR ARROW 🔥** | **9.000** | state | [BR049702026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.7 |
| May 20 | Real Time Big Data | 1.600 | state | [BR017442026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.8 |
| May 20 | VOX BRASIL | 2.100 | state | [BR024162026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.7 |
| **May 21** | **VETOR ARROW 🔥** | **9.000** | state | [BR093012026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.7 |
| May 21 | 100 Cidades | 2.000 | state | [BR065292026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.7 |
| May 21 | Real Time Big Data | 1.600 | state | [BR071142026](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) | 0.8 |

Source: public registry [TSE](https://divulgacandcontas.tse.jus.br/divulga/) via AFOS Analytics API. 🔥 highlights samples ≥ 3.000. Status "registered ≠ published" — confirmation of effective release requires verification from two primary sources before citing numbers.## 3. What the press covered

The institutional axis of the day had two converging signals on May 17. [Hugo Motta declared to G1 that the request to open the Master CPI will receive "regulatory treatment"](https://g1.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/17/motta-diz-que-pedido-de-abertura-da-cpi-do-master-tera-tratamento-regimental.ghtml), in remarks reproduced [by Revista Oeste](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxOZWR0NVFOOUtaa0F2TU9EMWp6b1NxNkR3N1YycjZjeWtXWE1mbXk4b3NFQ0tSRFlGTURTT3h0aFBBZHctRVdoSklPSGl1YmR5eEFuWGU3TlBoOWdjeF9NeHFPYUZZWm1QNVpYVmM0V2dvYzZnRWZCSnRzZU5YNWR3NmV6bFpPc0x2RE5pNUplRXBGQQ?oc=5), [by Pleno.News](https://news.google.?oc=5) and [by Portal 96FM as "we will comply with the regulations"](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxQZ1FES1V2a1VIWlJfYzJ1QzdERWxyaC1RRjlkUVQ3SS1PU0szSTBwZkdaczM1RV9pWjh5enlrRk5GRjZ4eEhSOUdCNXRtRkFQa0JtNnJwTVMyeG1QNVVpWG9oRURkTjJBZlJlSmlTY19iazZla2FrdlZ5Z3RsSzlyei1zeW9aUWhDTTkxY2xvZ3pVLXNleXN3YnlLNA?oc=5) — a signal of institutional moderation in the Chamber that may cool the urgency of the CPI even with the seven requests already filed. In parallel, [Folha de S.Paulo advanced that Lula tells allies he will resubmit to the Senate Jorge Messias's nomination for a STF seat](https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/poder/2026/05/lula-diz-a-aliados-que-vai-reenviar-ao-senado-indicacao-de-messias-para-vaga-do-stf.shtml), reusing the dossier from a previously rejected nomination — a convergence of signals that [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) prices as a reduction in the impeachment-via-politics scenario.In the electoral arena, [Lula responds in his bid for reelection with a package of benefits and sees the Master case corner his opponents](https://news.google.?oc=5). [Lula's and Flávio Bolsonaro's campaigns are already engaged in legal battle at the TSE during the pre-electoral period](https://news.google.?oc=5), in a movement also covered by [BPMoney as an intensification of judicial dispute at the TSE before elections](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxPRFdWOGdkQUE1MXhvbENuM1JxcnpoMnU3b1J6UVJLREZGQkJHWkdoZlJqMTBUSy1OZGtVWnFrbm4xLUcwZ0RFSmdmVkE2aG85TWY5bzNtblZWck9DbG9pRGhLQzVLY2xNTkhzQkptY0hnTTVRSUtlSHRoa3hVVTJ6U2xVejFRVHR0MlFJZEJsSEJNalNEMW1lbUlVY29zc1F6M1lwdDltbldiVFNHVEZROUpR?oc=5) and by [Imirante.com](https://news.google.?oc=5). [Ricardo Kotscho signed an analysis at UOL Notícias stating that the wind has turned in Lula's favor and against Flávio Bolsonaro](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizgFBVV95cUxOSFlMYXM5VG5lcDNUclNBRWR5ZjAtRlJKOGs2eWxEV1NFUVVUMG1BN1hNQkQ4bEg5YjRSbEVtNmxENzZzZWl6RXBHWURiWlZ6ZU9fMzcyY0RlcFpHVVpOdTloMjRyR2dVUlM0V1VBSHFnWmVyT3BreTV4ZERDMDlSTExwQ1RndmRNOGxUWGc1bkNtVjNYbnNzZUZybXhwNFp4Tnlmc3MtbV9ZeGdZMVo1YmIwc1BOZmhTQ0RZN0xscFNKaGgwLUJXQWNfRHpKZw?oc=5), while [Correio Braziliense reported that Lula tries to ride the wave of Flávio's crisis following audio messages to Vorcaro](https://news.google.?oc=5).On the opposition flank, [Flávio Bolsonaro stated "they underestimated me, I won't give up on my Brazil"](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxPLWNkNTlNalEwLW5qUUVKUE95eklOd2pVRk1NSGJldEJVcGhPbVd4UzBMeTJBcXVPREZsc1RsbXE4RWtUdFUyY2U5aEZNdkxYNm9kY2hxbk9SdGIxeFFDeUY4N3JIZkh1dEx0V1c3MnE0T1ZRMnZ2SjFPekdKVzYtdDBSQUNjNS1CMndvSTNEN0N3dndHY1BDdVNUa3l6M2l5VmxfcEFBelhvSjBJeE5WRFhBTkstcXJKa255RWVIaGxQRlpVQWc?oc=5) in remarks reproduced by Gazeta do Povo. In the right-wing center option, [Abilio Brunini (mayor of Cuiabá, PL/MT) told Rdnews that he does not believe Flávio suffered damages, but wants a CPI on Banco Master and takes a dig at Zema](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxOVlN3c3RxanQ2S2J3ZFdJbGRGblZjMHkzMW5ReEo1UnlpS0MyTlhRZzFiOXI4dG5XQ0g3Nkp4NUlZM084ckpqdjl5WVlPY1ZNVks1NDc0ZG5UbWJVa0RqVjJSQ3l0NE16QkQ4U09nbElXN2l5bVBUdVdaelp2V3IxZzVGRVNxUmxOUTgxaDN3WU1kaVdfM3lLdF9odElkanJyVzhCa3ZiTXFfU3Bmb200aFFQTHBqSzA?oc=5), signaling internal hostility in the non-[PL](/en/glossary#pl) center-right segment. In the center, [Folha de S.Paulo confirmed that Democracia Cristã formally nominated Joaquim Barbosa as a presidential pre-candidate and solidified a party split](https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/colunas/painel/2026/05/dc-oficializa-nome-de-joaquim-barbosa-como-presidenciavel-e-consolida-racha-no-partido.shtml), in coverage also conducted [by Pleno.News](https://news.google.?oc=5) and [by Poder360](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxQYlowTklqZ1dfN0tRSTJVd1M0YkFVYzlscFZETkJvSFJUNnJFSFhjaEJpSkNEV2J0NlpNWkVxOEUtZjNYUHk5bUlHMnhGeTYtQ2EtclRHN0w2a3RSLTZUdTh6dlE1RklZTGhJVmNLMW9qdHhId0hnbWpkdElOeEdEWXN0eUhyQ29PR01WakVZTVVjRllCdS11cDdudjNBenlMekpR?oc=5). [Aécio Neves signaled PSDB neutrality in the presidential race without Ciro Gomes as a candidate](https://news.google.?oc=5).

On the economic front, [Folha de S.Paulo highlighted that ending the tax on low-value imports is the government's first reaction to recent defeats in Congress](https://news.google.?oc=5).## 4. Divergences of the day

> **Market × [Datafolha](/en/glossary#datafolha) — divergence widens:** [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) prices a gap of +13,20pp Lula (USD 11,10M summing accumulated volumes Lula + Flávio) in the [1º turno](/en/glossary#primeiro-turno); [Datafolha](/en/glossary#datafolha) published on May 16 (n=2.004) registered +3pp. In 18 hours the divergence **shifted from 9pp to 10,20pp** — the market continued pricing Flávio's deterioration while the national survey remains as the sole reference point of the pre-audio period.

> **[STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeach reaches cycle minimum:** fell to **6,15%** on May 17 (USD 71k accumulated), 6,60pp below the peak of 12,75% recorded on May 15. The market fully discounted the impeach momentum generated by the Flávio–Vorcaro audio and prices in that the [reinomination of Messias to the STF (Folha)](https://www1.folha.uol.com.br/poder/2026/05/lula-diz-a-aliados-que-vai-reenviar-ao-senado-indicacao-de-messias-para-vaga-do-stf.shtml) and the [procedural treatment of the Master CPI (G1)](https://g1.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/17/motta-diz-que-pedido-de-abertura-da-cpi-do-master-tera-tratamento-regimental.ghtml) draw an Executive–Legislative axis that displaces the [STF](/en/glossary#stf) stage.

> **[MDB](/en/glossary#mdb) Senate confirms low-liquidity distortion:** the anomalous spike of 16,55% on May 16 (USD 254k accumulated volume) **collapsed to 4,70%** on May 17 (USD 1k accumulated, ↓11,85pp in 18h). Senate sub-markets outside the [PL](/en/glossary#pl) have accumulated volumes in the USD 1k range, requiring that any variation above a few points be interpreted as liquidity noise, not signal.

## In summary

1. **Lula × Flávio gap widens to +13,20pp on [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket)** (USD 11,10M summing accumulated volumes Lula + Flávio); divergence with published [Datafolha](/en/glossary#datafolha) (+3pp) widens to 10,20pp in 18 hours, with Lula consolidating stability and Flávio retreating.
2. **[STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeach reaches cycle minimum at 6,15%** (USD 71k accumulated, ↓6,60pp in 48h vs peak 12,75% on May 15); convergence of Executive–Legislative signals — reinomination of Messias to the [STF](/en/glossary#stf) (Folha) and procedural treatment of the Master CPI (G1) — sustains the market's institutional discount.
3. **[MDB](/en/glossary#mdb) Senate confirms distortion:** collapse from 16,55% to 4,70% in 18 hours with USD 1k accumulated volume validates the low-liquidity caveat in Senate sub-markets outside the [PL](/en/glossary#pl); Zema resumes leadership in 3rd place on [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) (36,50%, ↑4,00pp in 18h).—

- [G1 — Motta says request to open Master CPI will receive 'regimentary treatment' (May 17)](https://g1.globo.com/politica/noticia/2026/05/17/motta-diz-que-pedido-de-abertura-da-cpi-do-master-tera-tratamento-regimental.ghtml)**Sources consulted — secondary articles (Google News redirect URL — click resolves to article):**

- [Pleno.News — CPI do Master terá 'tratamento regimental', afirma Hugo Motta (May 17)](https://news.google.?oc=5)

- [BPMoney — Lula e Flávio Bolsonaro intensificam disputa judicial no TSE antes das eleições (May 17)](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxPRFdWOGdkQUE1MXhvbENuM1JxcnpoMnU3b1J6UVJLREZGQkJHWkdoZlJqMTBUSy1OZGtVWnFrbm4xLUcwZ0RFSmdmVkE2aG85TWY5bzNtblZWck9DbG9pRGhLQzVLY2xNTkhzQkptY0hnTTVRSUtlSHRoa3hVVTJ6U2xVejFRVHR0MlFJZEJsSEJNalNEMW1lbUlVY29zc1F6M1lwdDltbldiVFNHVEZROUpR?oc=5)
- [Brasil 247 — Lula e Flávio Bolsonaro ampliam disputa judicial no TSE (May 17)](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxQOXJta0lFYTZaMVBuVDZUMDBHTVNEUWdsQWNBQU01MWtUUDBweGU2OEFjSHJMdUZkcEVWRG1fR1U1eS02dlhDV19JQVRyZmEwRlotMG4xenZOcHdkeklsQm9DVXRTNEJHcjE1czZoZS1FWEpGLUdGM00zczR6Ym9Ud25nT2FxTF9pS09xX0RUT214dw?oc=5)

- [G1 — Aécio Neves signals PSDB neutrality in presidential race without Ciro Gomes as candidate (May 17)](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- [Folha de S.Paulo — Lula reacts in bid for reelection with package of benefits and sees Master case corner opponents (May 17)](https://news.google.?oc=5)- [G1 — Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro campaigns already in legal battle at TSE during pre-electoral period (May 17)](https://news.google.?oc=5)

**Methodology.** [Polymarket](/en/glossary#polymarket) crosscheck (live prices and accumulated volumes via gamma API — Brazil presidential **USD 78.85M accumulated since opening**, 2nd place, 3rd place, [STF](/en/glossary#stf) impeach **USD 71k**, Senate, inflation 2026), electoral surveys registered with the [TSE](/en/glossary#tse) ([Datafolha](/en/glossary#datafolha) May 16 published n=2,004 BR-00290/2026; [Quaest](/en/glossary#quaest) May 13 n=2,004) and daily journalistic coverage. **Accumulated USD volumes since opening of each market, snapshot at close of May 17, 17:00 BRT** — cited in Section 1 as liquidity context alongside %, per convention established May 17. Variations in pp compared with snapshot of May 16, 22:30 BRT (evening), except where another reference is noted. Each factual claim appears with inline link to primary source or plain-text attribution to outlet. Synthesis generated by AFOS Analytics and reviewed prior to publication.
